title: angostura undulata
intro: Angostura undulata, also known as the angostura tree or guianese angelique, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Angostura undulata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Angostura undulata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in South America and the Caribbean.
